pageContext.name: Catwoman 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: The DC Coin Collection for the Faces of Gotham™ continues. This time it's the face of the cat-burglar, CATWOMAN™, presented on a shaped and colored 1oz pure silver coin.  This unique coin follows the shape of CATWOMAN's face, with light relief on the front of the coin giving it a more 3D feel. Each coin in the collection is packaged inside the same compact, modern, branded case – designed with a window to enable you to display this striking collectible. The Certificate of Authenticity can be found on the back of the case along with the coin's number in the limited 5,000 mintage.   Continue your collection with this coin today….it is the purrfect addition!
